description: The caplog fixture parameter is declared but never used in test_apply_work_dir_extra_paths_share_same_host_source_missing_warns. Additionally, loguru does not propagate to standard logging, so caplog would not capture loguru warnings anyway.

Eight test functions for _apply_work_dir_extra_paths repeat the same 4-line setup pattern (source_dir = tmp_path / 'source', source_dir.mkdir(), work_dir = tmp_path / 'work', work_dir.mkdir()). This should be extracted into a shared fixture to reduce duplication.
